svg.title: Synalux POS — gift cards
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for gift cards. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Issue / Redeem / Reload / Balance check / Deactivate
Note: Many states prohibit expiry under 5 years -- check local law
Scan barcode / swipe / type 16-char card number:
Remaining after redeem: $15.50 stays on card
Inactivity fee: allowed in some states (off)

Physical + Digital -- 16-char codes -- Twilio SMS -- Denomination presets -- Admin-configurable
